posts.author: ranvir
posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: Street would believe only when the numbers come through. So we ll have to wait. That’s one Secondly - along with better revenues from Rajasthan and Maharashtra, expect additional costs and increased depreciation Basically - lets wait for Q1 results

posts.author: Ramanathan_Narasimha
posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: IMHO the long overrdues from KARNATAKA has shaken my confidence in the business model of the company. In a B2G setup, getting paid is the most critical part. It makes me doubt that any of the other contracts with any state government may lead to a similar situation. If B2C becomes a major portion of the business, this risk will get reduced automatically and the OCF should also improve. If the management is able to create any other way of ensuring payment for services rendered, it will be a great relief for the investors. Disclosure: Not investe.Not a buy sell or hold recommendation. ONly my vi…

posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: Script is consolidating a lot near CMP despite of RJ pathology & MH radiology additional revenue expectation in the current FY. Am I missing something or it’s ready to blast after Q1/Q2 results ? Please share your opinion as well
